_comment: AAOF Project Configuration — fill in the values for your project.
_schema: See docs/config.schema.md for full field documentation.
project_description: A brief description of what this project does.

version_control._comment: Set enabled to true if your project is managed with Git/GitHub.

environment_context._comment: Defines the deployment environment. type must be 'lab', 'staging', or 'production'. If not set, the agent will ask before proceeding past STEP 1.
